title: Pumped Up Kicks
why_this_song: Pumped Up Kicks by Foster the People (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Run, run, run, run, run, run
Run, run, run, run, run, run
He'll look around the room, he won't tell you his plan
Hanging out his mouth, he's a cowboy kid

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "better" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "better" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "other" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "other" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Run, run, run, run, run, run

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Foster the People one question about "Pumped Up Kicks", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Foster the People sobre "Pumped Up Kicks", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Pumped Up Kicks" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Pumped Up Kicks" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Pumped Up Kicks" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Pumped Up Kicks" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
